title: 3D Crystal Clusters for Mythic Upgrades!
description: Makes the crystal clusters from Mythic Upgrades 3D
body:
Changes the boring normal crystal clusters into epic 3D model ones!
Also does so to vanilla Amethyst.

Adds a nice model for all the crystal clusters from Mythic Upgrades, to see what they look like you can visit the Gallery section. 

Perfect for players who love immersive aesthetics and want their magical materials to truly shine.
For best looks I recommend a shader pack.

Resource pack made for Mythic Metals

Credits for the model goes to Stridey, Thats what the .json file tells me ("credit": "Created by Stridey").

Maybe someday I will change the models to look more unique from eachother.
